About.title: About Soma Code
About.description: Soma Code is a software house focused on delivering modern, scalable, and user-centric digital experiences. We develop everything from agile MVPs to complex management systems, using the most advanced technologies on the market.
About.shukkinDesc: A modern, multilingual time-tracking and attendance management web application.
About.kantanFlowDesc: The digital Scrum Master for solopreneurs. Hypersync between Lean Canvas, Backlog, and GitHub in a premium ecosystem.
